# Upcoming Events ![](https://www.waf.org.sg/ui/frontend/assets/img/title-top-right-shap.png)

# Our Initiatives![](https://www.waf.org.sg/ui/frontend/assets/img/title-top-shap-2.png)

![Grants](https://www.waf.org.sg/files/2025/Homepage/Initiatives/1.png)

## Grants

Expand your talent pool and transform your company with salary support by hiring and reskilling mid-career switchers using the Career Conversion Programme.

[Find Out More](https://www.waf.org.sg/grants)

![Consultancy](https://www.waf.org.sg/files/2025/Homepage/Initiatives/2.png)

## Consultancy

Get the right advisory and aid to enhance your business processes and strategies to maximise efficiency and productivity amongst your employees.

[Find Out More](https://www.waf.org.sg/consultancy)

![Insights](https://www.waf.org.sg/files/2025/Homepage/Initiatives/3.png)

## Insights

Don't miss our key insights and updates that provide the latest features and stories that may provide the right takeaways for you and your company

[Find Out More](https://www.waf.org.sg/insights-and-updates)

# Premier Highlights ![](https://www.waf.org.sg/ui/frontend/assets/img/title-right-shap.png)

![Capability Building and Talent Retention](https://www.waf.org.sg/files/2025/Homepage/JR.png)

## Capability Building and Talent Retention

Job Redesign

Empower your people, energize your business.

Job Redesign puts employees at the center of transformation—aligning roles with their strengths while meeting evolving business goals.

It’s not just change—it’s progress with purpose.

[Find out more](https://www.waf.org.sg/job-redesign)

![Stay Ahead with Exclusive Access!](https://www.waf.org.sg/files/2025/Homepage/Highlights%20on%20Home%20Page.png)

## Stay Ahead with Exclusive Access!

Upcoming Events

Join our community to receive the latest updates on events, insights, and opportunities. Get insider access to business transformation strategies, workforce development, innovation trends, and digital adoption—all curated to empower your growth and keep you future-ready.

[Sign up now](https://www.waf.org.sg/subscription)

![Fuel Change with Career Switchers](https://www.waf.org.sg/files/2025/Homepage/CCP%20for%20SME%20Prof.png)

## Fuel Change with Career Switchers

CCP for SME Professionals

Set your new hires up for success with a 3-month immersive training programme that equips them to reskill, adapt, and thrive in a rapidly changing world.

Includes a free 3-day onboarding workshop to jumpstart learning and integration from day one.

Build skills. Build confidence. Build the future.

[Discover more](https://www.waf.org.sg/grants/ccp-for-sme-professionals)

![Capability Building and Talent Retention](https://www.waf.org.sg/files/2025/Homepage/JR.png)

## Capability Building and Talent Retention

## Empowering Businesses. Transforming Workforces.

WAF drives innovation, growth, and collaboration to help local businesses build a future-ready workforce. Through cutting-edge initiatives and shared expertise, we equip enterprises to adapt, lead, and thrive in a dynamic market.

[Stay Ahead – Subscribe to WAF](https://www.waf.org.sg/subscription)

[Subscribe Now](https://www.waf.org.sg/subscription)

By subscribing you agree to our Privacy Policy and provide consent to receive updates from our federation.

#### Follow us on

metadata.title: Workforce Advancement Federation (WAF) | Empowering Singapore’s Future-Ready Workforce with Grants & Support
metadata.Description: Workforce Advancement Federation (WAF) supports Singapore enterprises in workforce transformation through government grants, strategic partnerships, and capability development. As a non-profit, WAF empowers businesses to navigate change and build a future-ready workforce.
